title: MP to ever
description: um its a modpack with stuff for the one game that has modding
body:
# The Modpack to ever It's for the boys!!!
Classic machinery / magic (work in progress) modpack for members of the balls extended community! ### Server Resources Using Forge ver 1.20.1-47.2.17,
Add the following: - [Discord Integration (SRV)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dcintegration/files/5332465) - [Combat Log](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/combatlog/files/4848245) - [WorldEdit](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/worldedit/files/4586218) - [spark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spark/files/4738952) - [Connectivity](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/connectivity/files/5503116) - [Smooth Chunk Save](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smooth-chunk-save/files/5138123) - [Cupboard](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard/download/5470032) - [Adaptive Performance Tweaks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/adaptive-performance-tweaks/files/5531585) Remove the following: - BadOptimizations - BetterF3 - Controlling - Create Big Contraptions - Dynamic FPS - Jade - Jade Addons - Oculus - Radium - WorldEdit CUI **Additional server resources possibly on GitHub at some point maybe idk**
